positive: Minimalist abstract cosmic animal silhouette, featuring a stylized golden retriever wolf outline leaping over a geometric crescent moon. The background should be a gradient blend of deep sapphire blue and twilight indigo, highlighted with nebula swirls of electric cyan and soft lavender. Utilize thick, clean black outlines (line art) on a cream-colored background. The style should be modern vector illustration with high contrast, emphasizing negative space. Composition is perfectly centered, designed to wrap around fabric. Clean edges, crisp details, and vibrant, harmonious colors.
